description_wiki: Poland, officially the Republic of Poland, is a country in Central Europe.

description: Germany from 1933 to 1945 while under control of the Nazi Party
description_wiki: Nazi Germany, officially the German Reich and later the Greater German Reich, was the German state between 1933 and 1945, when Adolf Hitler and the Nazi Party controlled the country, transforming it into a totalitarian dictatorship.

aliases: Ground forces of the United States Armed Forces
description: land service branch of the United States Armed Forces
description_wiki: The United States Army (U.S. Army) is the land service branch of the United States Armed Forces.

description: security and rescue military service branch for U.S. waters
description_wiki: The United States Coast Guard (USCG) is the maritime security, search and rescue, and law enforcement service branch of the United States Armed Forces.

description: maritime land force service branch of the United States Armed Forces
description_wiki: The United States Marine Corps (USMC), also referred to as the United States Marines or simply the Marines, is the naval infantry service branch of the United States Armed Forces.

description: air warfare branch of the U.S. Army from 1926 to 1947
description_wiki: The United States Army Air Corps (USAAC) was the aerial warfare service component of the United States Army between 1926 and 1941.

description: United States Army installation located in North Central Kansas
description_wiki: Fort Riley is a United States Army installation located in North Central Kansas, on the Kansas River, also known as the Kaw, between Junction City and Manhattan.

description_wiki: Texas (  TEK-səss) is the most populous state in the Southern United States.

description_wiki: New York, also called New York State, is a state located in the northeastern United States.

description_wiki: Kentucky (US:  , UK: ), officially the Commonwealth of Kentucky, is a landlocked state in the Southeastern region of the United States.

description_wiki: California () is a state in the Western United States that lies on the Pacific Coast.

description: city in and county seat of Salt Lake County, Utah, United States and the capital of Utah
description_wiki: Salt Lake City, often shortened to Salt Lake or SLC, is the capital and most populous city of the U.S. state of Utah.

description_wiki: Utah is a landlocked state in the Mountain West subregion of the  Western United States.

description: census-designated place in Mohave County, Arizona, United States
description_wiki: Beaver Dam is an unincorporated community and census-designated place (CDP) in Mohave County, Arizona, United States, that is located in the Arizona Strip region and was settled on December 2, 1863.

description: worldwide economic depression (1929–1939)
description_wiki: The Great Depression was a severe global economic downturn from 1929 to 1939.

description: military unit
description_wiki: The 124th Cavalry Regiment (nicknamed "Mars Men") is a United States Army cavalry regiment, represented in the Texas Army National Guard by 1st Squadron, 124th Cavalry, part of the 56th Infantry Brigade Combat Team at Waco.

description: U.S. civilian mariners
description_wiki: The United States Merchant Marine refers collectively to U.S.-flagged commercial vessels, both privately and federally owned, and the civilian mariners who crew them.

description: capital city of Victoria, Australia
description_wiki: Melbourne ( MEL-bərn, locally [ˈmæɫbən] ; Boonwurrung/Woiwurrung: Narrm or Naarm) is the capital and most populous city of the Australian state of Victoria, and the second most-populous city in Australia.

description: country in Oceania
description_wiki: Australia, officially the Commonwealth of Australia, is a country comprising the mainland of the Australian continent, the island of Tasmania and numerous smaller islands.

description: capital city in Maharashtra, India
description_wiki: Mumbai ( muum-BY; Marathi: Mumbaī, pronounced [ˈmumbəi] ), also known as Bombay ( bom-BAY; its official name until 1995), is the capital city of the Indian state of Maharashtra.

description: country in South Asia
description_wiki: India, officially the Republic of India, is a country in South Asia.

description: capital city of West Bengal, India
description_wiki: Kolkata, also known as Calcutta (its official name until 2001), is the capital and largest city of the Indian state of West Bengal.

aliases: The Land of Red Rivers and Blue Hills
description: Indian state
description_wiki: Assam is a state in northeastern India, located south of the Eastern Himalayas along the Brahmaputra and Barak River valleys.

description: Empire in the Asia-Pacific region from 1868 to 1947
description_wiki: The Empire of Japan, also known as the Japanese Empire or Imperial Japan, was the period of Japanese history spanning 79 years, starting from the Meiji Restoration on 3 January 1868, until the Constitution of Japan took effect on 3 May 1947.
